channel.title: The Economic Edge: Master Your Wealth

item.title: Britons are less bored than they used to be. This is bad
item.description: "Discover why a decline in boredom among Britons is a cause for concern. Tune in to our thought-provoking podcast as we explore the consequences of a society that's always 'on' and what it means for our mental health, creativity, and overall well-being."
